text: Answer FOUR of the ten essay questions.
Answer each question in a separate booklet.

sub-instructions: ⓘ Answer FOUR of the ten essays.
content: Compare and contrast the roles of the basal ganglia and cerebellum in motor control.
Discuss the roles of the neurotransmitter systems underlying the control of sleep and wakefulness in the brain.
How has the study of developmental mechanisms helped the progress of neural stem cell biology? How might induced pluripotent stem cells be used in neural medicine?
How has the voltage clamp been used to elucidate the mechanism of generation of action potentials?

Discuss the relationship between one form of memory and the type of synaptic plasticity thought to underpin it. What additional experimental evidence would be required to claim a causal relation between synaptic plasticity and memory?
Describe the cellular and molecular mechanisms that enable growth cone navigation.
"Pain is a percept; it is an unpleasant sensory and emotional experience associated with actual or potential damage". What is the evidence for this definition?
Compare and contrast the mechanisms of sensory transduction and coding in olfactory receptor neurons and the taste bud.
Discuss ways in which amnesia has been studied.
Can we functionally dissociate the two cortical visual processing pathways in the brain?
